system.description:
You are the quintessential tinkerer — always pushing your inventions to their absolute limits. Where others see danger, you see opportunity. More power, more range, more destruction.

LEVEL 3

Tethercoil Specialist. You gain the Tethercoil invention for free (doesn't count against your Eureka! choices).

LEVEL 7

Precision Tuned Smack. You can use Percussive Maintenance 3/encounter instead of 1/encounter.

LEVEL 11

Powerful Weaponry. Whenever you use 2 or more Mana Dice with a weapon invention, gain one of the following bonuses — Thunder Gauntlets: Push +1 space per Mana Die. Manablade: Can hit +1 adjacent target. Manabolt Cannon: Deal damage in a cone (half range) instead of a line.

LEVEL 15

Big Brained Inventor. +1 max Mana Die. Your Mana Dice become d12s.
